items.reason: Changed doc replaces removed log_rate_limit behavior with request/access/diagnostic sample rates, derivation, worker authority, and dynamic config notes.
Changed doc removes the obsolete DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT environment variable, matching the new worker-authoritative sampler design.
Changed doc replaces dscli log_rate_limit config with the three sample-rate options and derivation semantics.
Changed navigation adds the new log sampler design entrypoint for the logging module.
Changed module overview adds LogSampler responsibilities and routes readers to the new sampler design.
New design doc covers the new LogSampler behavior, config surface, propagation, hot-path constraints, and tests.
Existing canonical logging design still documents log_rate_limit and LogRateLimiter even though the PR removes them and adds LogSampler.
Existing trace doc still says SetRequestTraceUUID creates a local decision via log_rate_limit/LogRateLimiter, which is stale under request_sample_rate and LogSampler.
Existing access recorder doc does not describe the new access sampling guard/facades or access_sample_rate behavior for CLIENT and ACCESS records.
Existing PLOG plan still describes bypassing log_rate_limit sampling instead of the new diagnostic_sample_rate and request sampled-in semantics.
Existing PLOG summary still states PLOG bypasses log_rate_limit request sampling and was not updated for LogSampler diagnostic handling.
